overall.description: A third-person game scene following a character walking along a mountain trail toward a coastal area. The character traverses a dirt path between rocky cliffs and grass fields, eventually reaching a wooden dock overlooking a body of water with distant mountains and shoreline structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail between rocky cliff and grassland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward distant mountains, flanked by rocky terrain on the left and tall grass on the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with layered stone formations running alongside the path
tall green grass and vegetation lining the right side of the trail
large mountain peaks with rocky faces and green slopes visible in the distance
uneven dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks underfoot

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail carved between a rocky cliff on the left and tall grass on the right. The path leads toward distant mountains bathed in warm morning light, with no other characters or vehicles present in this isolated natural setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal trail approaching waterfront with wooden barriers

events.description: path curves left revealing coastal waters and distant shoreline structures across the water
character turns left toward the water, passing wooden X-shaped barriers on the left

agents.ego_description: following the curving path toward the coastline, navigating past wooden obstacles while approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: calm body of water with gentle waves becoming visible as the path opens up
large X-shaped wooden obstacles or barricades placed along the left side of the path
stone buildings or ruins visible on the distant shore across the water

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the character curves left toward the coast, revealing a body of water and distant shoreline structures. Wooden X-shaped barriers line the left side of the path as the grassy terrain gives way to a coastal overlook, with the camera following the character's turn toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over coastal water

events.description: steps onto wooden dock structure extending over the water, leaving the dirt path
stops at the end of the dock to look out at the water and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock and stopping at the end to overlook the water, turning slightly to survey the coastal view

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier extending over the water with planks and support posts
vertical wooden posts marking the edge of the dock structure

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a weathered wooden dock extending over the calm coastal waters, leaving the dirt trail behind. Walking to the end of the pier, the character stops to survey the view of the water, distant shoreline structures, and surrounding mountains, with wooden posts framing the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that gradually opens into a wide coastal vista. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt path carved between a rocky cliff and tall grass, heading toward distant mountains bathed in warm morning light. As the trail curves left, the landscape expands to reveal a body of water and shoreline structures, with wooden X-shaped barriers appearing along the path as the terrain shifts toward a coastal overlook. The scene then transitions from the dirt trail onto a weathered wooden dock extending over the calm water. Finally, the camera follows the character to the end of the pier, where they stop to survey the surrounding mountains and distant structures framed by wooden posts.
